title: Runtime package boundary lane precheck
delta_summary: local package initializer exports Runtime at `framework.runtime` boundary
keeps import ergonomics stable for runtime callers

risk_signals.evidence: without __init__ export, callers depend on deep import path `framework.runtime.core`
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay can break stable runtime import contract

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k 'autonomous or execution' -q
uv run --package framework python - <<'PY' ... import framework.runtime export check ... PY
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if package export contract is required and targeted runtime/server bundles are green
